mapper.select: select p.post_board_idx, p.post_idx, p.post_subject, m.member_name post_writer_name, p.post_date, p.post_read_count, (select count(*) from reply_table where post_idx = p.post_idx) as reply_cnt, p.post_file from post_table p, panya_member_table m where p.post_writer_idx = m.member_idx and p.post_board_idx = #{board_idx} order by p.post_idx desc
mapper.insert: insert into post_table(post_subject, post_text, post_file, post_writer_idx, post_board_idx, post_date, post_read_count) values(#{post_subject}, #{post_text}, #{post_file}, #{post_writer_idx}, #{post_board_idx}, now(), #{post_read_count})
mapper.select: SELECT BOARD_NAME FROM BOARD_TABLE WHERE BOARD_IDX=#{board_idx}

SELECT P.POST_BOARD_IDX, P.POST_IDX, M.MEMBER_NAME POST_WRITER_NAME, TO_CHAR(P.POST_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') POST_DATE, P.POST_SUBJECT, P.POST_TEXT, P.POST_FILE, P.POST_WRITER_IDX, P.POST_READ_COUNT FROM POST_TABLE P, PANYA_MEMBER_TABLE M WHERE P.POST_WRITER_IDX = M.MEMBER_IDX AND P.POST_IDX = #{post_idx}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM POST_TABLE WHERE POST_BOARD_IDX = #{post_board_idx}

select p.post_board_idx, p.post_idx, p.post_subject, p.post_text, m.member_name post_writer_name, to_char(p.post_date, 'yyyy-mm-dd') post_date, p.post_read_count, (select count(*) from reply_table where post_idx = p.post_idx) as reply_cnt from post_table p, panya_member_table m where p.post_writer_idx = m.member_idx and p.post_board_idx = #{post_board_idx} and
p.post_subject like CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%')
p.post_text like CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%')
member_name like CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%')
order by p.post_idx desc

select count(*) from post_table p, panya_member_table m where p.post_writer_idx = m.member_idx and p.post_board_idx = #{post_board_idx} and
p.post_subject like CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%')
p.post_text like CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%')
member_name like CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%')
